title: Goodness Passion Ignorance  | BG 14.05 - 14.09 | HG Amitasana Das | HKM Mumbai
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: So goodness, passion and ignorance, based on the teachings of His Divine Grace A. C. Bhaktivedanta Swamishala Prabhupada.
This is text 5 of the 14th chapter.
Material nature consists of three modes, goodness, passion and ignorance.
When the living entity comes in contact with nature, he becomes conditioned by these modes.
In the spiritual world, in our original state,
we are not under the grip or the clutches of these modes.
Goodness, passion and ignorance in Sanskrit is also called
Sattva Guna, Raja Guna and Tamo Guna.
